Value Prop of Offer:

Grow your bookkeeping/financial business through content marketing (even if you’re not a content writer normally) and get clients in the next 4 days. 

 

Core Demographic:

Bookkeepers and Financial Professionals

 

Market’s Core Desire:

More clients, better clients, higher paying clients.

YouTube Example:

Competitor’s Offer Value Prop(s)?



CPA Moms

Spent more time with your family and less time building someone else’s practice. 

You can be a successful CPA without spending 60-80 hours per week. 

Launch your own firm and work flexibly from home. 

“You can have a family and a firm.” 

Start your own firm and be there for every motherhood moment 

Watch your kids grow up without sacrificing your career





Andrew (Dope CFO)

You don’t need to work 80 hours a week for dozens of clients

You don’t need to discount your services to be the cheapest in town

You don’t need any advanced degree or letters behind your name. 



Have less clients, work less hours, and earn fees 5x to 20x more than what the average bookkeeper does. 



Bookkeeper’s hourly rates have plummeted in the last decade - some industry leaders are considering it a crisis. 

SPG: Can we take some angles attacking bookkeepers on upwork and other freelance platforms? 



Earn hundreds an hour as a bookkeeper. 





✅ The 4 key skills any bookkeeper can use to build a six figure practice from anywhere in the world



✅ How to use "VIP" to become a respected authority in any niche you work in



✅The soft skills that are even more important than any letter behind your name



In 30 minutes, you’ll learn the skills to justify almost ANY price for your future clients. 



  	



	Working from home, switching to monthly retainers, and offering unique (sexy) services. 

Grow your own successful bookkeeping business even if you have little experience.

You don’t need to spend thousands of dollars to learn bookkeeping and get clients.

If you know Quickbooks you could be making money as a virtual bookkeeper.

Work remotely, choose your clients, earn 6 figures, your own boss, in-demand field (MamaCounts)

No B.S. Blueprint for Getting Clients From Social Media

Ad Example:

 

Headline:

More Clients in The Next 4 Days?

 

Body Copy:

You don’t need to spend thousands of dollars to grow your bookkeeping business each month. Instead, I’ll show you an easier way to get more high-quality clients in the next four days. 📈

 

And the best part? You don’t need to:

 

🚫Spend a penny on ads.

🚫Hire an over-priced social media agency.

🚫Spend hours online creating content

🚫Get distracted from your core business.

 

Click the “Learn More” button to see how it works now.

 

 

Alternative Headline Option:

No B.S. Blueprint For Getting Clients on Social Media

 





Ad #2:

What if you could get at least one new, high-quality bookkeeping client in the next 4 days? Even better, what if I could show you a way to land that client while actually working fewer hours than you are right now?

 

Hey I’m Alyssa with COMPANY, and while that might sound too good to be true…

 

The truth is, over the past X years I’ve helped Y bookkeepers and accountants to grow their practices, generate lower-maintenance, better-paying clients and regain their freedom.

 

Just be warned: following the advice I want to share can lead to significantly more free time to spend with your spouse and kids…

 

And you may even end up actually loving your work and jumping out of bed with a smile each morning.



Interested? Click the learn more button now to see my proven system for getting a new client in the next 96 hours.

 

Headline:

Get a new client in the next 4 Days (while working half the hours?)

Ad Idea Hooks:

Does Agility Increase Speed?

Does Agility Training Make You Faster?

What really increases agility?

3 Exercises That Actually Increase Agility

Does Doing Cross-Training Really Make You Faster?🤔

 

 

Ads:

 



Body Copy:

 

Does Cross-Training Really Make You Faster?🤔

 

There are countless

programs and coaches out there all promising to help make you agiler and

faster. ⚡ Some of them say cross-training is key, others say to stay in

your lane.

 

So, who’s right?

 

The truth is,

cross-training can be an effective way to increase your speed, but ONLY if you

follow a proven process. 🤓

 

That’s why we developed a 3 Step Training System that lets you increase speed, agility, and explosiveness no matter your age or athletic ability.

 

The best part? You can do this from anywhere, even your living room or backyard and start seeing results in as little as 4 weeks. 🙌

 

Click the Learn More button now to start training like a pro.   

 

Headline:

The Proven 3 Step System that Gives Athletes More Speed and

Agility in 4 Weeks.
